user_system_path: Issue #281 active — rung-9 organic non-owner validation. Agent verifies the non-owner loop is mechanically ready and prepares the validation ask; the terminal named-value proof is human-gated.
no_routing_contract: The Agent must read ACTIVE_HANDOFF.md and the active issue before acting, and must follow the active issue exactly. The Agent may not ask Brandon to route, repeat, or arbitrate.

terminal_state_authority.merge_through_rule: Merge-through is allowed only after local proof, GitHub checks green, forbidden work touched is NO, and the PR receipt records the source-truth closeout and terminal state.

allowed_files_raw: Active seam: issue #281 rung-9 non-owner validation. Backend surfaces (app/api/**, lib/**) are open ONLY for smallest-correct repairs when readiness verification proves a break in the already-proven non-owner loop, each repair with proof. Control files, docs, scripts, tests, and GitHub receipts for readiness verification and the validation ask are open.
forbidden_files_raw: No new product surface. No dashboard UI, no start/try/pricing pages, no Slack surfaces (owner-only lane is not the rung-9 path), no acquisition agents, no Stripe, no migrations, no new connectors, no #244, no #246, no resolver wiring (recorded post-rung-9 candidate), no broad cleanup. No paid tests without owner approval. No outbound sends by default.
required_browser_proof: Not required for readiness verification. If a repair touches a live user path, prove that path per AGENTS.md proof doctrine before merge.
acceptance_condition: One real non-owner completes the loop with a durable receipt row and names one concrete value, recorded as a proof receipt on issue #281; rung 9 marked COMPLETE in FOLDERA_BUILD_ORDER.yaml with evidence.
stop_condition: Stop when the rung-9 readiness receipt and validation ask are posted on issue #281 and the human validator is the only remaining dependency (BLOCKED on external human), or when the named-value proof lands and rung 9 closes MERGED_AND_CLOSED.
anti_regression_checks: issue #276 is COMPLETE — Command State Resolver v0 merged via PR #279 (e848d01); the verdict surface is closed to exactly MERGE_READY/FIX_FIRST/WAIT/CLEAR and weak truth collapses to CLEAR
issue #249 is COMPLETE — scorer-winner invariant enforced in selectSourceBackedRightNowState; PR #257 merged 2026-06-11
issue #226 is COMPLETE — rung-6 owner-path readiness proven via PR #256
issue #231 is COMPLETE — work-state purity merged via PR #232
issue #220 is COMPLETE — rung 5 live proof passed
issue #262 must stay event-driven — not a daily brief or dashboard summary
rung 9 requires a human — mechanical pipe proofs were #259 and do not satisfy it
root markdown file count is bounded by gate:continuity (MAX 8)
a new governance rule may only be added by editing an existing keep-list file
trusted class requires outbound evidence — inbound volume alone yields unclassified
personal class is sticky and salience-capped
acquisition/growth agents are quarantined (default OFF) until owner re-enables
next_command: Verify the non-owner loop is mechanically ready (presence state, signal freshness, receipt path — free truth reads, IDs/counts/booleans only), post the readiness receipt and exact validation ask on issue #281, then hand the ask to the first non-Brandon validator.
